intro: The hospitality sector has been the most targeted in a wave of 46 phishing incidents tracked between April 8 and April 24, 2026, with 39 classified as high severity. Threat actors FakeWallet, Lazarus Group, and Scattered Spider were observed in these campaigns, which also affected cryptocurrency, technology, finance, and government organizations globally, including Canada, the United States, Bangladesh, and Latin America. Key vulnerabilities exploited include CVE-2023-22515, CVE-2023-34048, CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2023-4966, and CVE-2024-21893.
